prose: Prochloraz resolves to a negative call under an adversarial-negative tier, and the reasoning is deliberately restrained. The decisive strand is curated mechanism: there is no curated Parkinson's DirectEvidence and no registration as a neuro-AOP stressor [E1], and no AOP pathway is attached—so the engine has no evidence-ranked mechanistic hypothesis linking this compound to neurodegeneration. The bioactivity is real but anti-diagnostic: 16 mechanistic assay hits, including 3 mitochondrial, represent exactly the imposter signal the engine is designed not to act on [E2]. Promiscuous assay activity, absent curated mechanistic context, does not constitute a diagnostic signal. Brain-penetrance is plausible [E3], yet penetrance alone is not a discriminator—many benign and bioactive compounds cross the barrier. Taken together, corroboration cannot substitute for curated mechanism, so the correct, calibrated conclusion is that prochloraz is not flagged.

citations.detail: No curated Parkinson's DirectEvidence and not a registered neuro-AOP stressor.
citations.reference: Davis AP, Wiegers TC, Johnson RJ, et al. Comparative Toxicogenomics Database (CTD): update 2023. Nucleic Acids Research. 2023;51(D1):D1257-D1262. Mechanistic scaffold: OECD Adverse Outcome Pathway Wiki. AOP-3 (WPHA/WNT Endorsed): inhibition of mitochondrial complex I of nigro-striatal neurons leads to parkinsonian motor deficits (Terron A, Bal-Price A, et al. Arch Toxicol. 2018;92:41-82). AOP-3 anchors a convergent mitochondrial-complex family — complex II/III/IV and redox cycling (AOPs 588/587/589/593, under development) — whose formal expansion EFSA funded in 2024 (call NP/EFSA/PREV/2024/02). For Alzheimer's: the endorsed AOP-12/48 (aging neurodegeneration + memory) anchor with a non-endorsed Tau/amyloid overlay (AOP-429/475).

citations.detail: Bioactive: 16 mechanistic assay hits (incl. 3 mitochondrial). This is the imposter signal the engine correctly does NOT act on.
citations.reference: U.S. EPA ToxCast/Tox21 invitroDB (v4.2), accessed through the NICEATM Integrated Chemical Environment (ICE). Active hitcalls only; queried on the salt-form-correct record.

citations.detail: Brain-penetrant, but penetrance is not a discriminator here.
citations.reference: Meng F, Xi Y, Huang J, Ayers PW. A curated diverse molecular database of blood-brain barrier permeability with chemical descriptors (B3DB). Scientific Data. 2021;8:289. Daina A, Zoete V. A BOILED-Egg to predict gastrointestinal absorption and brain access of small molecules. ChemMedChem. 2016;11(11):1117-1121.
